texto: It is only those who do not know who wander the paths. A blind eye and a stout heart create a true wanderer. Those who seek the paths do so in vain
autor: only those who can see deep might hope to wander.
explicacao: Citação de only those who can see deep might hope to wander. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It is only those who do not know who wander the paths.
